title: Dashboard auto-refresh / live updates
description:
The dashboard should automatically refresh its data without user interaction. This is critical for the wall-mounted tablet use case.

Implementation: Use TanStack Query's refetchInterval option on all dashboard queries. Recommended intervals:
- Upcoming tasks: 60 seconds
- Today's events: 60 seconds
- Shopping list: 30 seconds
- Transit arrivals: 15 seconds (already may have this in transit module)

Acceptance criteria:
- Dashboard data refreshes automatically at configured intervals
- No visible loading flicker during refresh (use keepPreviousData)
- Refresh intervals are appropriate per data type

Dev Lead.notes: Clean implementation. refetchInterval passed as hook option. placeholderData prevents flicker. Intervals appropriate per data type.
